title: Otherworldly Munchkin: Let’s Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!
titleRomaji: Isekai Munchkin: HP 1 no Mama de Saikyou Saisoku Dungeon Kouryaku
titleEnglish: Otherworldly Munchkin: Let’s Speedrun the Dungeon with Only 1 HP!
titleNative: 異世界マンチキン　ーＨＰ１のままで最強最速ダンジョン攻略ー
synonyms: Isekai Man Chikin
Another World Munchkin: Conquering the Dungeon as the Strongest and the Fastest with Only 1 HP
สุดเห่ยเกิดใหม่ต่างโลก HP แค่ 1 แต่สุดแกร่งสุดเปรียวพิชิตดันเจี้ยน
synopsis: 16-year-old Yukito Kirihara lives with his 14-year-old sister Sana, who he treasures more than anyone else. But when an ogre shows up outside of his window looking for Sana (a shocking event in its own right), Yukito leaps to save her—and is killed. He's offered the promise of reincarnation by a mysterious woman, who gives him a character sheet in a mysterious book. But when Yukito sees Sana in there, too, he sets off to find her, and save them both—even if he only has 1 hp with which to do it! (Source: Kodansha USA)

title: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai @comic
titleRomaji: Shiotaiou no Satou-san ga Ore ni dake Amai @comic
titleNative: 塩対応の佐藤さんが俺にだけ甘い＠comic
synonyms: 冷淡的佐藤同學只對我撒嬌
Aren’t You Too Sweet Salt-God Sato-San?
The Salt-God Sato-san is only sweet to me!
คุณซาโต้ยอดนักเมิน เธอหวานใส่ผมแค่คนเดียว
The Cold Sato is Only Sweet to Me
synopsis: Satou-san is the unattainable flower of the class. She is always cold and curt with classmates, but only I know she's actually very cute when she smiles, even if she's not much of a photographer. Oshio-kun is friendly and lively, but only I know he works at his family's cafe after school. He does a great job with the cafe's SNS account, and his mischievous smile makes my heart skip a beat! Innocent and sweet, but sometimes frustrating, this is a 120%-pure fluffy story about two people falling in love for the first time.

title: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleRomaji: Kono Inu to Kitara Mago no Koto shika Kangaeteinai: Kensei Maou no Yarinokoshi
titleNative: この犬ときたら孫のことしか考えていない～犬生魔王のやり遺し～
synopsis: The "Demonic Invasion" lasted for hundreds of years, and countless heroes were cut down by the Demon Lord during their reign…! Until the hero Terios, known as The Last Hope, finally defeated the Demon Lord and brought peace to the land. But the hero Terios vanished, and the Demon Lord, thought to be dead, is miraculously reborn… as a dog!? This is the story of the last Demon Lord, now all soft and fluffy, desperately trying to live a peaceful life while protecting his granddaughter, now a fugitive targeted by all of creation. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Ring ni Kakero
titleRomaji: Ring ni Kakero
titleNative: リングにかけろ
synopsis: Takane Kiku and Takane Ryuji are the children of a legendary world contender boxer. Kiku, the daughter seems to have inherited her father's boxing sense and tries to teach Ryuji to become a world contender. However, Ryuji hates boxing and gets picked on. After Kiku and Ryuji leave their hometown for Tokyo, Ryuji eventually learns to discover a passion for boxing after an encounter with a boxing prodigy, Kenzaki Jun. This will eventually lead him to learn crazy moves and out of this world opponents to become one of Japan's top junior boxers. (Source: Anime News Network)
synonyms: Ring ni Kakero 1
Put it all in the Ring

title: You Shou Yan
titleRomaji: You Shou Yan
titleNative: 有兽焉
synopsis: In the wake of scientific advancement, the once majestic mythological animals can't be compared to the olden days now. The mythological animal Sibuxiang received orders to descend to the mortal world and to help out other mythological animals in dire straits wandering the human world. In the secular world, he met his old colleague Pixiu in a tight spot, his drinking buddy Tuye down in his luck, and the gold and silver Jue brothers who were demoted to the mortal world... what kind of stories will happen between them? (Source: AC.QQ, translated)

title: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleRomaji: Boroboro no Elf-san wo Shiawase ni Suru Kusuriuri-san
titleEnglish: The Apothecary Is Gonna Make This Ragged Elf Happy
titleNative: ボロボロのエルフさんを幸せにする薬売りさん
synonyms: Dying Elf and Apothecary
synopsis: An apothecary lives a quiet life selling potions and medicine in a country village, until one day he’s approached with a devil’s bargain. A pawnbroker offers him the perfect ingredient for crafting legendary medicine—but the “ingredient” turns out to be a mortally wounded elf! Legend has it the flesh and bones of elves can be ground up into a true panacea, and this elven maiden is on the brink of death after being ruthlessly tortured by slavers. Filled with rage, the apothecary vows to nurse her back to health and happiness, no matter what it takes. (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

titleRomaji: Jigoku de Mesu ga Hikaru
titleNative: 地獄でメスがひかる
synopsis: Hiromi is mistreated by her family because of her naturally ugly appearance. Unable to bear her situation, she attempts to commit suicide, but is rescued in the nick of time by a genius doctor, Iwao Toshiaki, and is exposed to human kindness for the first time. However, Iwao is trying to use Hiromi's brain to enter the realm of the divine, which is inaccessible to humans... (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning
titleEnglish: They Are Still Being Shaken This Morning
titleRomaji: Kesa mo Yuraretemasu
titleNative: 今朝も揺られてます
synopsis: Every morning at 6:58, commuters hurry onto the train at Sakuranomiya Station. For the past few months, a tentative romance has been brewing between two students from different schools. The young man is easily flustered, always stealing a glance at the young woman, but never making a move—much to the disappointment of the other passengers, who have been cheering them on in secret. Will this budding love story ever blossom? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Are You a Landmine, Chihara-san?
titleRomaji: Jirai nan desu ka? Chihara-san
titleNative: 地雷なんですか？地原さん
synonyms: That Girl Is Cute... But Dangerous?
Jirai Nandesuka? Chihara-san
Chihara, es-tu une Jirai ?
synopsis: It’s the start of a new semester, and high school junior Kuroki finds himself seated beside the girl everyone whispers about: Mai Chihara. With her gothic fashion, jet-black hair, and intense stare, Chihara is said to be a “landmine” girl or jirai-kei, the hyper-feminine, dark aesthetic often associated with yandere tendencies and unstable personalities. But when Kuroki accidentally draws Chihara’s attention, he discovers she isn’t nearly as unstable as people claim. Beneath the intimidating aura is a surprisingly sweet girl… if a little weird. Hesitantly, Kuroki begins to learn more about Chihara and her strange quirks. Is there more to her than her volatile reputation? Or is all the dark clothing just a red flag in disguise? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleEnglish: Me and the Prez, Drinking Under the Stars
titleRomaji: Shachou to Sake to Hoshi
titleNative: 社長と酒と星
synopsis: At 24, Reina Izutsu has recently become the new president of Izutsu Printing after taking over for her late father. Young and not quite experienced, Reina wants to do her best but unfortunately comes across as harsh with her employees. Stressed and feeling lost, Reina spends an evening drowning her sorrows in beer at an empty park. She rants and vents out loud to the starry sky that she wants to give up and quit being president, just letting off steam. Except, she fails to realize that her subordinate, 37-year-old section chief Kenichi Ishizumi, heard her drunken ramblings! But rather than use this against her, Kenichi finds himself charmed by the young woman. He vows then and there to support her and help her find her way as company president, no matter what! (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

synonyms: Boss, Booze, and Bright Stars

title: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleRomaji: Koppa Maichiru Sono Koro ni
titleNative: 木っ端舞い散る その頃に
synopsis: Kei Maebara gets a job!! The bizarre and eerie world of public service, depicted by Ryukishi07, from Higurashi When They Cry . In the 13th year of the Heisei era, in the Tokyo Metropolitan Area, Coastal Region... Due to the prolonged economic recession, the police force has weakened, and the growing number of disillusioned youth turning to semi-criminal lifestyles has led to a drastic decline in public safety... Amidst all this, Kei Maebara begins working at the district office. Can he become a respectable public servant? (Source: Akita Shoten, translated)

title: Real demo Shiawase ni Shite Kudasai ne?
titleRomaji: Real demo Shiawase ni Shite Kudasai ne?
titleNative: 現実世界でも幸せにしてくださいね？
synonyms: Be Happy in the Real World Too, Okay?
synopsis: High school girl Machino, who longs for the "love of destiny," loves to play the dating-sim game "Celestia." Despite maximizing the affection with all of the girls in the game, she can't decide on which one to choose for the confession event. After agonizing over the decision for days, an explosion occurs just as a shooting star flies over her house, and when Machino opens her eyes, she finds herself face to face with Sofia, the main heroine of Celestia.... "Machino... I always wanted to say it... I love you." An isekai summoning yuri harem romantic comedy begins, as her highly affectionate heroines jump into the real world! (Source: Ichijinsha, translated)

titleRomaji: Dantoudai ni Kieta Densetsu no Akujo, Nidome no Jinsei de wa Gariben Jimi Megane ni Natte Heion wo Nozomu
titleNative: 断頭台に消えた伝説の悪女、二度目の人生ではガリ勉地味眼鏡になって平穏を望む
synonyms: The Legendary Wicked Woman Wants a Peaceful Second Life as a Boring Studious Girl
synopsis: "Don’t you think it’s stupid to be so madly in love?" Princess Letitia is due to be executed by guillotine, for the terrible crimes she committed trying to win back her fiancee's love. However, just when she thought she was dead, she was returned back in time for a second chance at life. "I won’t fall in love in my new life. I’m going to live peacefully by becoming a sober, hard-working student with glasses!” But one day, her glasses slip off and Camilo, the school's superstar, sees her true face. Then, for some reason, Camilo begins to dote on her in a tidal wave of affection…!? (Source: Comic Days, translated)

tags.name: Heterosexual
tags.description: Prominently features a romance between a man and a woman, not inherently sexual.

tags.name: Reincarnation
tags.description: Features a character being born again after death, typically as another person or in another world.

tags.name: Age Regression
tags.description: Prominently features a character who was returned to a younger state.

tags.name: Shoujo
tags.description: Target demographic is teenage and young adult females.

chapterSourceTitle: Indozou No Nikki Manga

title: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako is a 40-year-old unemployed man who becomes engrossed in the VR RPG "Sword and Sorcery" after being laid off from his job. In the game, he goes by the name Zeros Merlin and rises to become a top-ranked player. However, he suddenly dies in the middle of a long gaming session. To his surprise, Satoshi wakes up to find himself in a massive unfamiliar forest. He soon learns from the goddess of this world, who brought him here after his death, that he has been reincarnated with all of his in-game stats intact. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

tags.name: Isekai
tags.description: Features a character from a modern-day setting being transported into an alternate world and has to adapt to their new surroundings.

tags.name: Magic
tags.description: Prominently features magical elements or the use of magic.

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.
